suggested_fixes: Wrap each cublasSgemm call with a status check (e.g., TORCH_CHECK(status == CUBLAS_STATUS_SUCCESS, ...)).
Clarify the row-major to column-major mapping in comments to reduce confusion.
warnings: No cuBLAS error checking after each SGEMM call; missing error handling could mask failures.
The leading dimension for U (lda=d) in SGEMM3 may be incorrect if strictly adhering to column-major conventions, but it matches the required qyh pattern.
